# Lyzo AI — Your Smart AI Coding Assistant

## 🚀 Overview

**Lyzo AI** is your intelligent coding partner inside VS Code. It helps you write, debug, and optimize code faster with AI-powered suggestions, explanations, and improvements—all right within your editor. Whether you're building something new or reviewing legacy code, Lyzo boosts your productivity with context-aware assistance.

## ✨ Features

- **Contextual Code Completion**  
  Real-time, intelligent suggestions as you type.

- **Code Explanation**  
  Instantly understand what a piece of code does—just select and ask.

- **AI-Powered Bug Fixing**  
  Detect and resolve bugs effortlessly with guided AI help.

- **Code Refactoring Suggestions**  
  Improve readability, structure, and performance with smart tips.

- **Custom Instructions**  
  Fine-tune the AI to respond the way you want by adding custom prompts.

## ⚙️ Getting Started

1. **Launch Lyzo**: Click the Lyzo icon in the VS Code sidebar.
2. **Start Chatting**: Ask your coding questions or start generating code in the chat interface.
3. **Use Contextual Code Actions**: Right-click on code or use the lightbulb icon to access Lyzo's AI tools.

## 💡 Code Actions (Right-Click Menu)

Use Lyzo's built-in code actions to supercharge your workflow:

- **Explain Code**: Understand the logic behind any code snippet.
- **Fix Code**: Get AI-assisted bug fixes on the fly.
- **Improve Code**: Optimize and refactor with AI-suggested enhancements.
- **Add to Context**: Add selected code to your current chat context for deeper interactions.

## 🔧 Configuration Options

- **Custom Instructions**  
  Tailor Lyzo's behavior to your unique workflow and coding style by adding custom guidance for the AI.

## 🛠 Support

Need help or have feedback?

- 📧 Email: [support@lyzo.ai](mailto:support@lyzo.ai)  
- 📚 Docs: [lyzo.ai/documentation](https://lyzo.ai/documentation)

We're here to help!

## 🔐 Privacy & Security

Your privacy matters. Lyzo does **not** store your code or prompts. All interactions are securely transmitted only to the AI provider you've configured, and nothing is ever stored on our servers.
